name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a large baking sheet and set aside.
3. In a bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, salt, and lemon peel.
4. In another bowl, combine butter and sugar. Beat until well blended. Add eggs and extract. Beat until light and fluffy. Beat in half the dry ingredients.
5. Stir in remaining dry ingredients with a wooden spoon.
6. Divide dough into two equal parts. Shape each part into smooth, evenly shaped logs about 12 inches long. Wrap logs in wax paper to make rolling them easier.
7. Unroll logs onto the baking sheet, spacing them as far apart as possible.
8. Press down on logs to flatten slightly. Place on the center of the oven and bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool.
9. Cut logs into half-inch slices using a sharp knife. Lay slices flat onto the baking sheet.
10. Return slices to the oven and toast for 5-7 minutes, turning them over halfway through the cooking time (the longer the baking time, the crisper the biscotti).
11. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before storing in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks. Can be frozen.
